judge_result.short_rationale: Includes washing the skin, but misses the required 'sterile dressing if needed' step and weakens escalation by saying to seek care only if irritation/redness persists, whereas the source says to consult a skin specialist after any skin exposure. Added details like removing clothing, soap, timing, drying, and avoiding ointment/oil are not grounded in the provided truth.
